title: Ballistic-resistant composite with maleic anhydride-grafted polypropylene
abstract: A ballistic-resistant composite includes at least one layer that has a network of ballistic fibers and a resin matrix. The resin matrix includes maleic anhydride-grafted polypropylene (MA-g-PP).
claims: 1. A ballistic-resistant composite comprising: at least one layer including a network of ballistic fibers and a resin matrix, the resin matrix including maleic anhydride-grafted polypropylene (MA-g-PP), the MA-g-PP having a molecular weight of 30,000 to 80,000, the network of ballistic fibers including ultra-high molecular weight polyethylene fibers, and the MA-g-PP having, by weight, 0.5% to 5% of maleic anhydride.
